## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement to existing feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] Plugin verifier passes (`./gradlew verifyPlugin`)
- [ ] New features are registered in `plugin.xml` (if applicable)
- [ ] Lexer/parser regenerated after `.flex`/`.bnf` changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested manually with `./gradlew runIde`
